title: String Duper Restorer
description: Removes MC-129055 / MC-59471 patches, making the string duper work on 1.21.2+
body:
# String Duper Fix Remover

Removes MC-129055 / MC-59471 patches, making the string duper work on 1.21.2+

Elimina los patches MC-129055 / MC-59471, Haciendo que el duper de hilo vuelva a funcionar en las versiones 1.21.2+

Créditos/Credits: [WinExp](https://github.com/WinExp/DumpedCarpetAddition)

# Farm not working?
Since Mojang has changed how the redstone works in the latest versions, [Check this video](https://youtu.be/mfv49tHgaQQ) to fix it.
